text: Good morning Jarvis! What's on the calendar for this Friday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Friday, August 09. You have the CareConnect stakeholder review at 3 PM, and pediatrician checkup for Lily.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that bedtime went very smoothly tonight. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. That sounds like a sweet moment. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Helping Ethan with his homework tonight. We need to sign his permission slip for the field trip to the science museum. He is growing up so fast.
title: Kids School Update

text: Got it, Mike. I can help with that. I've added the deadline and details to the calendar so we don't forget. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Writing up user stories for our upcoming sprint. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has billing integration. Let's see if we can optimize the code first.
title: Work Update

text: Good focus area. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping billing integration in the MVP. We should review this with Greg tomorrow morning.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that looking over our mortgage options. The refi quote saves us about $250 a month. Financial planning is key for the kids.
title: Finance Update

text: Interesting. Budget tracking is updated. That's $3,000 annually. It could cover the Colorado trip or 529 plans. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick log: Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. That is a clean implementation. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Working on the roadmap slides for Q4. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /sms/send under load. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! I've noted that. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /sms/send. We should review this with Greg tomorrow morning.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that tracking my weekly fitness metrics. I ran 5 miles but my knee felt tight. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Logged that. I've logged your vitals. Great run! Remember to stretch your hamstrings to help the knee. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily refused to eat her dinner today. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Good planning. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. He is asking lots of questions about exoplanet atmospheric compositions. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: He is doing so well. That's a great interest. I can summarize the atmosphere of Venus in a kid-friendly way. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has scheduling portal. This could be a blocker for the Vertex Health launch.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Got it, Mike. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping scheduling portal in the MVP. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that reviewing our household budget today. First United Mortgage offered 5.75% with zero points. Will talk this over with Sarah.
title: Finance Update

text: Sure thing! Budget tracking is updated. A rate of 5.75% is a big drop from 6.5%. I'll calculate your savings. Ready to calculate more rates.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Researching rover power systems in depth. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! Space science and tech is a great focus. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. VP Greg Holloway is complaining about the infrastructure costs for CareConnect. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. Got it, Mike. We can present a cost-benefit analysis showing that dropping these optimizations will cost more in support tickets. I can compile the competitor metrics if needed.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Took Lily to her medical checkup. I ran 5 miles but my knee felt tight. Health has to be a priority.
title: Health Update

text: Sure thing! I've logged your vitals. Great run! Remember to stretch your hamstrings to help the knee. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Lots of communication with Greg and Anika today. Logged my running mileage and stretched my knee. Tuned my local LLM settings and fits scrapers. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
